SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo

Interface PositionI

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
Position2D
public interface PositionI extends Serializable
The interface PositionI declares the signatures of methods that a position must implement.

Description

Invariants

 invariant      true        // no more invariant

Created on : 2026-01-23

Author:
Jacques Malenfant

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    equals(PositionI p)
    return true if p is equals to this.

  • Method Details

    • equals

      boolean equals(PositionI p)
      return true if p is equals to this.

      Contract

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      p - a position to be compared to this.
      Returns:
      true if p is equals to this.

Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa — Sorbonne Université, 2026
